# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

This project is a decentralized application (dApp) built on the Celo blockchain, using Next.js for the frontend and Hardhat for the backend. The dApp will allow users to interact with a Payeer.sol contract, which is a smart contract that enables users to send and receive payments on the Celo blockchain.

## Project Structure

- `web/`: The frontend application built with Next.js.
- `contracts/`: The backend application built with Hardhat.
- `test/`: The test files for the project.

## Project Setup

- [x] Scaffold the Project
    - Initialize Next.js in root (in 'web' directory).
    - Initialize Hardhat for contracts (in 'contracts' directory).

- [x] Customize the Project
    - Implement Payeer.sol contract. (Done)
    - Create Frontend UI with Spinner. (Done)
    - Integrate Wagmi/RainbowKit for Celo. (Done)

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Goals

- To build a fully functional dApp that allows users to send and receive payments on the Celo blockchain.
- To ensure the security and reliability of the smart contract.
- To provide a user-friendly interface for interacting with the dApp.

## Project Timeline

- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Test the Project
- [x] Deploy the Project

## Project Dependencies

- Next.js
- Hardhat
- Wagmi/RainbowKit for Celo
